formattedAttributes.TCGplayer Tip: Premium Deck Series: Sliver Overlord is a special release Magic: The Gathering product that features a pre-constructed deck of Sliver cards, all of which are premium foil. The deck is built around the Sliver Overlord, a powerful legendary creature that allows players to search for other Sliver cards and put them into their hand or onto the battlefield.

metadata.rulesText: All Sliver creatures have double strike.
metadata.flavorText:
"A rift opened, and our arrows were abruptly stilled. To move was to push the world. But the sliver's claw still twitched, red wounds appeared in Thed's chest, and ribbons of blood hung in the air."
—Adom Capashen, Benalish hero
